chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 1775 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.05.2022. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 7219/2022. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 7320/2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Ms Noreen Advocate / Associate of Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi Advocate for petitioner. ---- By virtue of a revision application the side of the plaintiff was restored and opportunity was provided to produce documents on record and also to cross examine in accordance with law subject to cost of Rs.5000/-. We may observe that opportunity as granted by the revisional court is only in respect of documents, list of which has already been filed after settlement of issues and are not a surprised document for the petitioner. With this observation the grievance of the petitioner perhaps has been redressed i.e. only those documents could be produced list of which already available on record. The petition stands disposed of on the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE A.
